title: Multiplayer Fix
description: Adds a reliable Multiplayer button that works even when the game incorrectly says “multiplayer is disabled. please check your microsoft account settings”.
body:
# **Multiplayer Fix** by USeAr3658
If you can’t open the Multiplayer menu and Minecraft shows something like  
**"multiplayer is disabled. please check your microsoft account settings"**,  
this mod is made for you.

**MultiplayerFix** adds a small extra button to the main menu that always opens the Multiplayer screen directly. No errors, no restrictions, no account issues - it just works.

This is a lightweight client‑side mod for Minecraft 1.16.5.  
It doesn’t change gameplay and doesn’t affect servers. It simply gives you a working way to enter Multiplayer when the default button is bugged.

# **Installation**
1. Install **Forge 1.16.5**.  
2. Download the mod `.jar` file.  
3. Place the `.jar` into your **mods** folder:  
   - Windows: `...\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\mods`  
   - Linux: `~/.minecraft/mods`  
   - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/mods`  
4. Launch the game — the new button will appear automatically.
